channel.title: CEDIS
channel.description: Discover the future of Software Engineering, Learning, and Artificial Intelligence. Since 2013, the Center for Studies, Development, and Innovation in Software has led innovative projects in research, development, and education.

item.title: Contact
item.description: Contact information for CEDIS including address, email, and social media links.

item.title: Our Partners
item.description: CEDIS benefits from the support and collaboration of various research partners, significantly contributing to the advancement of knowledge and innovation in their areas of operation. Among these partners, the following stand out: A3M - Learning for the Third Millennium Program: An innovative program from the University of Brasília, aimed at integrating advanced technologies and methodologies in education, focusing on preparing for the challenges of the third millennium. More information can be accessed at A3M UnB.

item.title: CEDIS Infrastructure
História do CEDIS
item.description: 2013 - Creation of the Software Factory Laboratory (lab FSw) 2019 - New researchers join, and following the consensus among all members, the laboratory is renamed to the Center for Studies, Development, and Innovation in Software - CEDIS.
